◎简　　介  

　　On the run from his corrupt employers an ex Special forces officer has been hiding out driving a cab for 4 years ,when suddenly he is visited by someone from his past . Doing the right thing and survival are the only choices he has.It's About Choices is a 90 minute English Action thriller shot in 12 hours.
